channel.title: Delta Green on Lone Quest
channel.description: Recent content in Delta Green on Lone Quest

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 7: The Motel
item.description: Session 7 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where another victim of the tatto is met.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 6: The Green Box
item.description: Session 6 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where a party is formed.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 5: Twin Suns
item.description: Session 5 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where things get moving before Lawrence is contacted again.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 4: Contact
item.description: Session 4 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence gets an interesting briefing.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 3: The Bag
item.description: Session 3 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence makes a choice.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 2: Pariah
item.description: Session 2 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence’s vision of the world is shaken to the core.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 1: The po-boy
item.description: Session 1 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where Lawrence gets some work to do.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 0: Main character creation
item.description: Session 0 for the Delta Green campaign PARALLAX, where we meet the main character, Lawrence Bartolini

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 10: Hypergeometry
item.description: Session 10 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where the team faces an unexpected unnatural danger

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 8: Hastur's shadow
item.description: Session 8 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where the teams hits a dead end.

item.title: PARALLAX, Session 9: A friend in need
item.description: Session 9 of the campaign PARALLAX for Delta Green, where a friend faces danger.
